places.en: I meet my friend at the cafe.
I go to the office. And then I work.
It's raining. But I go to the park.

I want to know the price
I want to see / look at
I like it here. / This place is good.

I live with my older sister.

objects.kr: 한국 여행이 설레서 잠을 못 잤어요.
objects.en: I was so excited about the Korea trip that I couldn't sleep.
I'm happy because I received a gift.
I was lonely because I was alone.
I get nervous when I speak Korean.
When I miss my family, I call them.
When I'm in a bad mood, I listen to music.
I want to feel new emotions in Korea.
I want to make Korean friends.
If I'm in a good mood, I smile.
If you're alone, you can feel lonely.
If I go to Korea, I'll be so excited.
The Korea trip is so exciting!
I was so happy because I was grateful.

adjectives.en: to feel excited / to have butterflies
